headline: Match Group to Present at TD Cowen's Technology, Media & Telecom Conference
summary: LOS ANGELES, May 13, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Match Group announced today that Steven Bailey, Chief Financial Officer of Match Group, will participate in a fireside chat at the TD Cowen Technology, Media...
